LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GARY DIGGS' UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. IN GRANTING PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF THE SETTLEMENT TERMS, HOWEVER, THE COURT DOES NOT EXPRESS ANY VIEW AS TO THE REASONABLENESS OF ANY REQUESTED ATTORNEYS FEES OR CLASS REPRESENTATIVE SERVICE PAYMENT, NOT HAVING BEEN PROVIDED WITH ANY DETAIL CONCERNING THE TIME OR EFFORTS EXPENDED BY THE ATTORNEYS OR THE CLASS REPRESENTATIVE. THE FINAL APPROVAL HEARING IS SET FOR JANUARY 20, 2015 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; SHERYL L. SAWYER CSR# 5976. (302/PJB)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Off Calendar

Final Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DANIEL F. GAINES of Gaines & Gaines, APLC, Tel No. (818) 703-8985 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. JUDITH DROZ KEYES of Davis, Wright, Tremaine, LLP, Tel No. (415) 276-6500 appearing for the Defendant Western Waterproofing Company, Inc.

RULING - The Court required parties to appear. Matter argued by counsel. The Court ruled as follows: Final Approval of Class Action Settlement granted. The Court awarded attorney's fees in the amount of $42,500.00 (30% of the net of the settlement amount). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Notice Of Motion And Unopposed Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF GARY DIGGS'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is off calendar as a duplicate entry. (302/AJR)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Unopposed Motion And Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Alex P. Katofsky, Esq. of Gaines & Gaines, Tel. 818.703.8985, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling, which was not contested. PLAINTIFF GARY DIGGS' Unopposed Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is granted. No opposition filed. In granting preliminary approval of the settlement terms, however, the Court does not express any view as to the reasonableness of any requested attorneys fees or class representative service payment, not having been provided with any detail concerning the time or efforts expended by the attorneys or the class representative. The final approval hearing is set for January 20, 2015 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Continued To Jan-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
